meta.note: This is a structural summary of the AMOS GOD MODE build conversation, not a verbatim transcript.

high_level_timeline.summary: Set up amos_env, installed dependencies, verified AMOS_ORGANISM_OS import, initial CLI tasks.
Brainstack, Sensors, Executor, Dashboard wired and status_probe used to confirm ACTIVE state.
Created amos_megabuilder.sh, amos_cognition_max.sh, amos_godmode_mega.sh and higher-level wrappers such as amos_ONECLICK_MEGA.sh / ULTRA concept.
Automated tasks repeatedly scanned AMOS_ORGANISM_OS for TODOs, stubs, missing functions, broken imports, and loop stability; results logged in _AMOS_STATE_LOG/task_results.jsonl.
Designed alias-based global CLI 'amos' to cd to repo, activate venv, run ONECLICK script, probe status, and open dashboard.
